settings.principle_text:
Wear the principle. Defend the right. Keep the dialogue open.

The shirt that started the conversation.

settings.custom_liquid:
I Started Libertas Loqui Because Speech Is the First Freedom

Every shirt is cut, sewn, and printed right here in America on premium Bayside blanks. No tribes. No rage. Just the quiet conviction that open dialogue still matters — and that clear thinking deserves to be worn.

To wear it is to carry a simple, enduring principle:

  • Speech is the foundation of every other freedom
  • Honest conversation beats silence or shouting
  • Crafted entirely in the United States
  • Timeless values, never partisanship

If these ideas resonate, the full covenant goes deeper into why a free society depends on the courage to speak, question, and listen — even when it’s uncomfortable.

Discover the Full Covenant
